task_description:
设计一个《无畏契约》战绩分析网页的主页设计图（PNG格式）。设计要求：
1. 该网页是一个游戏战绩分析平台
2. 主要功能：玩家账号、战斗统计（胜率、KDA、击杀数等）、英雄使用率、排位等级
3. 风格：现代游戏主题，深蓝色、紫色、霓虹灯效配色，科技感十足
4. 布局：顶部导航栏、左侧玩家卡片、右侧数据面板、中间战绩图表
5. 包含一些示例数据和图表视觉化
保存到 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.summary:
```json
{
  "reasoning": "用户要求设计一个Valorant战绩分析网页的主页设计图（PNG格式），需要包含特定的功能模块、布局和视觉风格。作为Designer Duck，我应该使用Python+Pillow库来生成这个设计图，包含：顶部导航栏、左侧玩家卡片、右侧数据面板、中间战绩图表，采用深蓝色/紫色/霓虹灯效配色。我将直接创建并执行一个Python脚本来生成这个设计图。",
  "action_type": "create_and_run_script",
  "params": {
    "language": "python",
    "code": "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建画布 (1400x900 像素)
width, height = 1400, 900
bg_color = (8, 20, 40)  # 深蓝色背景
image = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), bg_color)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(image)

# 定义颜色
PURPLE = (138, 43, 226)  # 紫色
NEON_CYAN = (0, 255, 255)  # 霓虹青色
NEON_PINK = (255, 20, 147)  # 霓虹粉色
DARK_BLUE = (8, 20, 40)
MID_BLUE = (25, 45, 85)
LIGHT_TEXT = (200, 200, 220)
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)

def draw_rect_outline(draw, xy, outline_color, width=2):
    """绘制边框矩形"""
    x0, y0, x1, y1 = xy
    draw.rectangle(xy, outline=outline_color, width=width, fill=None)

def draw_glow_text(draw, text, position, font_size=16, color=NEON_CYAN):
    """绘制带发光效果的文字"""
    x, y = position
    try:
        font = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", font_size)
    except:
        font = ImageFont.load_default()
    draw.text((x, y), text, font=font, fill=color)

# ============ 1. 顶部导航栏 ============
nav_y = 0
nav_height = 60
draw.rectangle([(0, nav_y), (width, nav_height)], fill=(5, 15, 30), outline=NEON_CYAN, width=2)

# Logo/标题
draw_glow_text(draw, "VALORANT TRACKER", (30, 18), 24, NEON_CYAN)

# 导航菜单项
menu_items = ["Dashboard", "Heroes", "Statistics", "Settings"]
menu_x = 400
for item in menu_items:
    draw_glow_text(draw, item, (menu_x, 20), 14, LIGHT_TEXT)
    menu_x += 150

# 登录按钮
draw.rectangle([(1200, 15), (1350, 50)], outline=NEON_PINK, width=2, fill=None)
draw_glow_text(draw, "Login", (1240, 22), 14, NEON_PINK)

# ============ 2. 左侧玩家卡片 ============
left_x = 20
left_y = 80
card_width = 300
card_height = 350

# 玩家卡片背景
draw.rectangle([(left_x, left_y), (left_x+card_width, left_y+card_height)], 
               fill=MID_BLUE, outline=PURPLE, width=2)

# 玩家头像区域（简单圆形）
avatar_x = left_x + card_width // 2
avatar_y = left_y + 40
avatar_size = 60
draw.ellipse([(avatar_x-avatar_size//2, avatar_y-avatar_size//2), 
              (avatar_x+avatar_size//2, avatar_y+avatar_size//2)], 
             fill=PURPLE, outline=NEON_CYAN, width=2)
draw_glow_text(draw, "PRO", (avatar_x-15, avatar_y-10), 12, NEON_CYAN)

# 玩家昵称和ID
draw_glow_text(draw, "ProPlayer#CN", (left_x+30, left_y+120), 16, NEON_CYAN)
draw_glow_text(draw, "Level: 42", (left_x+30, left_y+150), 12, LIGHT_TEXT)

# 排位等级
draw_glow_text(draw, "Rank: Radiant", (left_x+30, left_y+180), 14, NEON_PINK)
draw.rectangle([(left_x+20, left_y+210), (left_x+280, left_y+230)], 
               fill=None, outline=NEON_CYAN, width=1)
# 排位进度条
draw.rectangle([(left_x+22, left_y+212), (left_x+200, left_y+228)], fill=PURPLE, outline=None)

# 玩家统计
stats = [
    ("Wins: 1,254", left_y+260),
    ("W/L: 58%", left_y+290),
    ("Hours: 2,145h", left_y+320)
]
for stat_text, y_pos in stats:
    draw_glow_text(draw, stat_text, (left_x+30, y_pos), 12, LIGHT_TEXT)

# ============ 3. 右侧数据面板 ============
right_x = 340
right_y = 80
panel_width = 320
panel_height = 350

# 右侧面板标题背景
draw.rectangle([(right_x, right_y), (right_x+panel_width, right_y+panel_height)], 
               fill=MID_BLUE, outline=NEON_CYAN, width=2)

# 面板标题
draw_glow_text(draw, "Combat Statistics", (right_x+20, right_y+15), 14, NEON_CYAN)

# 统计项
stats_data = [
    ("K/D Ratio", "2.45", 55),
    ("Headshot Rate", "32%", 95),
    ("Avg Damage", "187.5", 135),
    ("Kill Count", "12,847", 175),
    ("Clutch Win Rate", "68%", 215),
    ("Plant Accuracy", "91%", 255)
]

for label, value, y_offset in stats_data:
    y = right_y + y_offset
    # 标签
    draw_glow_text(draw, label, (right_x+20, y), 11, LIGHT_TEXT)
    # 数值
    draw_glow_text(draw, val
